creator: mjl@luckie.org.nz
text: This issue is present in 11.1R, but wasn't present in 10.3R.  This is on a Dell Optiplex 9020 with an Nvidia card installed.  To remove the white screen I had to select "auto" in the Video options in the BIOS (rather than select the Nvidia card).  The auto apparently disables the onboard graphics.
